leaderboard_scope_group_match.name: leaderboard_scope_group_match
leaderboard_scope_group_match.value: ("leaderboard_snapshots"."leaderboard_scope" = 'overall' AND "leaderboard_snapshots"."idol_group_id" IS NULL) OR ("leaderboard_snapshots"."leaderboard_scope" = 'group' AND "leaderboard_snapshots"."idol_group_id" IS NOT NULL)

status_current_question_order.name: status_current_question_order
status_current_question_order.value: ("quiz_sessions"."status" = 'in_progress' AND "quiz_sessions"."current_question_order" IS NOT NULL) OR ("quiz_sessions"."status" IN ('completed', 'abandoned') AND "quiz_sessions"."current_question_order" IS NULL)

user_score_snapshots_scope_group_match.name: user_score_snapshots_scope_group_match
user_score_snapshots_scope_group_match.value: ("user_score_snapshots"."score_scope" = 'overall' AND "user_score_snapshots"."idol_group_id" IS NULL) OR ("user_score_snapshots"."score_scope" = 'group' AND "user_score_snapshots"."idol_group_id" IS NOT NULL)

user_score_states_scope_group_match.name: user_score_states_scope_group_match
user_score_states_scope_group_match.value: ("user_score_states"."score_scope" = 'overall' AND "user_score_states"."idol_group_id" IS NULL) OR ("user_score_states"."score_scope" = 'group' AND "user_score_states"."idol_group_id" IS NOT NULL)
